# cursor Provider

Manage Cursor Automations. Talks to the Cursor Automations API over Connect RPC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    cursor = {
      source  = "cursor/cursor"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "cursor" {
  # Or set the CURSOR_TOKEN environment variable.
  token = var.cursor_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) Cursor API base URL. Defaults to https://api2.cursor.sh. Can also be set via CURSOR_ENDPOINT.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Auth token for the Cursor API. Can also be set via CURSOR_TOKEN.
